features: Independent Subdomain Limits: Configure independent subdomain limits and defaults for Owner and Admin roles.
Active Tunnels Quota: Limit maximum concurrent active tunnels per user with SQLite tracking and admin overrides.
Standardised Dashboard Timestamps: Tooltip-enhanced standardised UTC and local browser dates across all tables.
CSV Data Exports: Client-side CSV export functionality for both reserved subdomains and personal access tokens.
Docker CLI Telemetry: Added robust client Docker context detection, appending ' (Docker)' to client OS telemetry.
Subdomains & Tokens Ownership Visibility: Added Owner email column in Admin/Owner views for active subdomains and tokens.
Tokens Expiration Extension: Admins/Owners can dynamically extend client PAT token expirations from the dashboard.
